/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAIT TO ADD COUNT 006, PC 417(A)(2), A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:006/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE PEOPLE DISMISS COUNTS 1 & 2, HAVING INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/STWPX/ACM/X:AS A CONDITIONOF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE UNDER A CURFEWBETWEEN THE HOURS OF 7PM AND 7AM AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/WS/WEAP/SA1:ROBERT MITCHELL/SA2:6TH ST, BETWEEN MARKET ST, AND HOWARD ST,, SF/SATERM/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT TO UNDERGO SUBSTANCE ABUSE COUNSELING AS DETERMINED BY ACM/ /X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/LDPX:09-14-20/DAWT/X:PARTIES AGREED THAT THIS IS NOT A D20 CASE AND MATTER RETURNED TO D11 FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING,//CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:09-14-20/987,2/NB/X:THE PEOPLE FILED MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/X:THE PEOPLE FILED EXHIBITS FOR MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/X:THE COURT SIGNED ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS FOR MOTION TO DETAIL WITHOUT BAIL/X:THE PEOPLE MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS GRANTED/X:NO BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: PPRF IS PROVIDED/
